title: Chapter 44
content:
Chapter 44

"Where are we going, brother?" Martha asked, but I simply smiled in return and said nothing. She asked the same question after a while when I replied, "We're just about to arrive."

And soon, we did arrive. As soon as Martha saw where we had arrived, she was surprised to see the presence of a small pond. "Wow."

"Can we take a bath? I smell terribly." Martha pleaded with an innocent expression, her tiny body jumping up and down. I nodded and said, "That's why we're here."

"Does anybody else know?" Martha asked.

"No," I replied. Of course, no one didn't know about this. This pond didn't exist here yesterday. I made it last night when I was hunting monsters. I made sure to clean this area of every monster before I dug the hole, before smoothing it with magic. Filling it with water wasn't a difficult task; it was keeping the water clean that was a difficult task.

Thankfully, the arrays at the bath pool back in our house were easy to understand, and I examined them in great detail before carving the same features here as well. Unfortunately, I wasn't strong enough to make an illusion array around the area, so I couldn't hide the pool from others just yet.

"Yahoo!!! I'm the first!!!" Martha shouted out loud before she jumped out of her clothes in an instant, her jiggly ass shaking left and right as she hoped in the pool with a skippy jump. I smiled and followed her in after the clothes on my body disappeared. Just to be safe, I stored her clothes in the inventory as well.

I rested in the water as Martha washed herself. She rubbed every nook and cranny, even her ass crack which she did so while facing away from me, giving me an ample view of her bubbly ass and the contents hidden between it.

Once she had properly washed herself, all the while I remained silent and just enjoyed the show, she dunked in the water once again before she resurfaced after about ten seconds, clean and pristine as she was.

She didn't actually need to bathe since I had used the [Cleanse] skill on her anyway while she was taking the bath, but what was wrong with a show of such potential? Once I had had my fill, I finally spoke, "How do you feel?"

"Amazing, and really happy!" Martha replied as she jumped closed to me and hugged me from my side, pressing her tiny boobs on my stomach while resting her head on my chest.

I smiled and combed her hair for a while before I said, "Martha."

"Yes, brother?" She raised her head to look at me deep in my eyes. My expression, however, turned serious as I said, "There is something I have to tell you."

"What is it, brother?" Martha asked.

"It's a secret and you can't tell anybody. Especially not Lucas and Dad." I said with utmost seriousness. Seeing the serious expression on my face, she also turned serious and nodded, "I swear I won't tell anybody."

"You promise?" I asked once again just to be sure.

"Yes," Martha replied with a serious expression.

"Good," I replied before I got up and sat at the edge of the pool, settling her between my legs. Once she was settled, she asked, "What is it, brother?"

"Do you see my penis?" I asked.

"Yes." She replied.

"Does it look any different?" I asked.

"Why would it look different. It's the same as always, isn't it?" Martha spoke as if it were obvious.

I nodded and activated the state of completion, enlarging my dick in front of her. My dick was bigger than her face so she was shocked, to say the least, as the pole rested a few inches away from her, so close that I could feel her hot breath on my dick, making it twitch.

As it twitched, it startled Martha, and she backed away, as she said with a horrified expression on her face, "Brother! There's something wrong with your penis! It's not normal! It's big like a tail!!!"

I sighed and pulled her closer before she could get out of range and said, "That's what I've been trying to tell you. This happened to me when I awakened."

She calmed down after a few seconds and looked at me with an inquisitive gaze, "This happened when you awakened mana?"

"Yes," I replied.

"Oh," was all she said before she asked after about ten seconds, "What does it do?"

"When it is big like this, it releases a liquid that has mana in it," I replied.

"What? Like a potion?" Martha was shocked as she made the assumption that hit the mark. I nodded and said, "Yes."

"Wow." Martha was now even more surprised, but I was short on time. Two minutes had already passed once I explained everything to her. She nodded, digesting all the information, and then finally asked the question I was hoping she would, "How does it let out the mana potion?"

"You have to stroke it," I replied.

"With my hands?" She asked.

"Yes," I replied.

"Okay," Martha replied, and was about to move when I stopped her. I remembered the grip Sandra had on me the first time we did it, and I didn't want to go through that again.

I smiled and said, "Do it gently, okay?"

I didn't just tell her, I properly guided her. As her small hands wrapped around my dick, and I guided her to move it up and down as it was intended to be done, a moan leaked my mouth that caught her attention.

"Brother." She called out when I let go of her hands to let her go on her own, and she was doing an amazing job, just like the other two who did everything on instinct, and asked, "Does it feel good when I do this?"

"Yes. Very." I replied.

"Just like when you massaged me?" She innocently asked.

"Yes," I replied.

"Oh!" Martha's face lit up, and with a brightened expression, she said, "Then you should have told me before. I don't care about mana or whatever. I just want to make you feel good."

And with that, her enthusiasm made all the difference as she began to rub me faster and with a technique that I didn't think she was capable of. She twirled her fingers at the top of my length, stimulating my sensitive head, and made a shiver go up and down my spine again and again with each stroke.

I wasn't even trying to hold back so when the pleasurable sensation assaulted me, I couldn't help but cum.

"Argh!"

Without any warning, with a loud groan, I began to squirt my semen on her face and her body. She was surprised and raised my length to the sky, which only made the fountain of squirts fall on her hair and the rest of her face.

"Oh, brother!" She exclaimed in surprise but didn't move away. She must have established it was the mana potion I was talking about. And true to my assumptions, while my dick throbbed in her left hand in the wake of my intense orgasm, she brought her right hand to her mouth and tasted the small amount that had coated her fingers when I was cumming.

"Haa... Haa..."

In the middle of my deep breaths, I couldn't help but appreciate the tantalizing scene, making my dick twitch crazily in her grasp.

"Brother!" She let go of my dick and stood up, still covered in my spunk as she excitedly said, "It is mana. There is mana in this strange pee of yours. It replenished my aura a little!"

"Haha." I chuckled and said, "See? What did I tell you? Now, why don't you do the same with your mouth?"

"With my mouth?" She asked, a little apprehensive.

"Mhm." I nodded and took the liberty of explaining in great detail.

"Don't you see how much of it you wasted when you could have just put it in your mouth? If I directly let it out in your mouth, it wouldn't go to waste." I explained, and she nodded in utmost seriousness.

"You're right, brother. I didn't think of that." Martha replied as she knelt between my knees once again but she was a little reluctant taking my dick in her mouth, I could tell.

"What is it?" I asked.

"Isn't your penis dirty, brother?" Martha asked as she raised her head to look at me pitifully.

I chuckled softly and asked, "Remember when I massaged your vagina with my mouth?"

"Yes?" Martha said, not sure where it was going.

I smiled and said, "Do you remember how good you felt from that?"

"Very much!" Martha immediately replied before she connected the dots herself as she asked, "So if I do it with my mouth, you would feel even better?"

"I sure would," I replied.

"Oh. Then why didn't you just say so? I'll do anything to make you feel good. Even take your dirty penis in my mouth." She said jubilantly, even when the last bit was unnecessary.

"So?" She looked at me and once again innocently asked, "How should I do it?"
